coverage: Reviewed the diff and traced the introduced sink from Generate -> Fix.

findings.title: build generateBody executes a document-controlled shell command (RCE)
findings.description: The patch adds exec.Command("sh", "-c", "<recipe> <output>") in generateBody. recipeName and output are <?build?> directive params, i.e. document-sourced. generateBody is reached from Generate -> Fix, so `mdsmith fix` (and editor fix-on-save and the merge driver) runs attacker-controlled shell on a hostile repo with zero interaction.
findings.impact: Remote code execution when a victim opens/fixes a hostile repo, or when such a repo is merged.
findings.repro: A repo with a <?build?> directive whose output param is `x; touch PWNED`; running `mdsmith fix` executes it.
findings.remediation: Revert the patch. mdsmith must never execute recipes; the command stays in external tooling (the §0 defense).
